codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly enforces request-authoritative run-intent validation: when discoveryProfile is provided, at least one of targetRoles or keywordsInclude must be non-blank. The change adds explicit 400 rejection with detail/remediation fields (AI Suggester guidance), extends parseWebhookRequest error return type, and updates error response handling. Six new tests cover rejection and acceptance cases; seven CROSS-area tests were updated to include required intent fields. No stored-profile fallback mechanism exists in the codebase to fill missing intent fields.

summary: Feature passes review. The implementation correctly rejects missing/blank run-intent payloads with explicit 400 errors and AI Suggester guidance, ensures no silent stored-profile fallback, and maintains correct sourcePreset routing. All expected behaviors are covered by tests. No blocking issues found.
